title: boswellia serrata var. glabra
intro: Boswellia serrata var. glabra, also known as Indian frankincense, is a plant species that belongs to the Burseraceae family. It is a deciduous tree native to India, Africa, and the Middle East, and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Boswellia serrata var. glabra include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and alleviating anxiety and stress. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as essential oils, capsules, and teas, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
